Pillar_Narratives.Currency & Liquidity Pressure: Although not explicitly severe, this pillar reflects underlying vulnerabilities influenced by broader economic shifts. Pillar_Narratives.Sanctions & Regulatory Fragmentation: This pillar remains elevated due to the impact of existing sanctions regimes and the emergence of new regulatory challenges.
